title: Munkeys Cobblemon PokeLoot
description: Find loot while exploring to get cool Cobblemon rewards!
body:
_**Adds a variety of loot that spawns naturally during world generation, designed to enhance your Cobblemon adventures!**_




# NEW LOOT POOLS!
### PokeBall Loot
Pokeball, Potion, Rare Candy, Revive.

### GreatBall Loot
Greatball, Dusk Stone, Fire Stone, Thunder Stone, Water Stone, EXP Share.

### UltraBall Loot
EXP Candy M, PP Max, Leftovers, Lucky Egg.

### MasterBall Loot
Masterball, Ability Patch, Rare Candy, Beastball.

### PremierBall Loot
Power Bracer, Power Belt, Power Band, Power Weigth, Power Anklet, Relic Coin 10.

### CherishBall Loot
Cherishball, Ability Patch, Rare Candy, EXP Candy XL.
